scripts.postinstall: patch-package && echo 'Installing global MCP deps...' && npm i -g claude-mermaid 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARN: claude-mermaid install failed, run: npm i -g claude-mermaid' && npm i -g @colbymchenry/codegraph 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARN: codegraph install failed, run: npm i -g @colbymchenry/codegraph' && echo 'Global deps done'
